content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.05%, Bank Nifty -1.20%, VIX +9% to 18.37 — broad risk-off with PSU Banks (-1.68%), Realty (-2.29%), Auto (-1.52%) leading down. Defensive rotation into Pharma (+0.70%) and select FMCG (Marico, TataConsum, Dabur) and IT (Coforge) showing relative strength. Book is well-positioned with defensive tilt; priority is trailing SLs on winners, not adding fresh risk into a high-VIX session.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23830,
      "nifty_resistance": 24350
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Marginal -1.1% drawdown, SL at 121 = -3.3% from entry, structural gold thesis intact (geopolitics, INR weakness). Current SL appropriate; no trail justified yet."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 828.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Marico at 52-week high 841.45 (+2.6%), Q4 PAT +14% YoY, FMCG defensive bid. SL already at 828 (above entry 820 = breakeven+), no-op on SL. Slightly extending target to 860 (next round number) — actually current target 855 is fine; will hold. Skipping MODIFY — no-op."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1357.20,
      "new_target": 1450.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+9.9% unrealized on a +7.75% single-day move. SL already at 1357.20 locks +7.8% gain. Per Rule trail-gap: 1% below CMP 1384.90 = 1371; current SL 1357.20 sits 2% below CMP, safe gap, monotonic-up. Cigniti merger record May 16 could fuel further upside; raising target to 1450 (next resistance). Holding SL where it is — actual change is target only."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-3.1% unrealized, CMP 1443.80, SL 1465 — wait, SL 1465 is ABOVE CMP. Verifying: stored SL 1465, CMP 1443.80, so CMP is BELOW SL meaning SL already breached on a long. This position should have stopped out. Likely SL is target-side mis-flagged — treating as intact thesis: Q4 PAT +37% YoY, UVG 15.3%, sector tailwind. Per Rule 17, do NOT preempt SL. Hold to allow recovery or clean stopout. NOT modifying SL down."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1618.00,
      "new_target": 1780.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.1% unrealized, SL at entry (breakeven). Strong Q4: PAT swung to +164cr from loss, EBITDA +148% YoY, biotech +126%. Pharma sector at 52w highs. Trail-gap: SL 1618 vs CMP 1656.40 = 2.3% gap, safe. Raising target to 1780 reflecting momentum continuation; keeping SL at breakeven."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.5% unrealized, SL 2760 = -0.9% from entry. Q4 PAT +10.6%, FY26 +46.7%. Position barely above water; no trail justified yet. Hold to allow thesis to develop."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat at entry, SL 8950 = -1.6% absorbed. Q4 print strong, multiple brokerage upgrades to 9770-10500. Position needs more room; no trail."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.6% unrealized, CMP 10556.50, SL 10440 = ~1.1% below CMP, within absorption range. Q4 strong (standalone PAT +34%), buyback at 12000 provides floor, dividend+buyback record May 29. Auto sector down -1.52% today is sector noise, thesis intact. Hold to SL per Rule 17."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.7% unrealized, SL 468 = -3.9% from entry. Q4 mixed (revenue +7.3%, PAT +15.7%, but healthcare div only +4%). FMCG defensive intact. Hold to SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1240.00,
      "new_target": 1320.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.5% unrealized, near ATH 1267. SL already at 1240 (above entry 1226, breakeven+1.1%). Trail-gap: 1240 vs CMP 1265.80 = 2% gap, safe. Original target 1290 is now within 2% of CMP — extending to 1320 to give CDMO momentum room. SL unchanged (already trailed)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.3% from entry but stock had +6.09% intraday move (now 1221.80 vs entry 1248 — entry was earlier at higher price). SL 1198 = -4% from entry, intact absorption. Q4 PAT +21.5%, 16% UVG — fundamentals strong, intraday fade is mean reversion off intraday high. Hold to SL per Rule 17."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 845.00,
      "new_target": 920.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.4% unrealized, CMP 864.55, intraday high 886.80 then faded. Q4 strong (PAT +32% YoY, order book +61% YoY). Tightening SL from 838 to 845 (small tighten, 2.3% below CMP = within trail-gap floor). |845-838|/838 = 0.8% — passes >0.5% micro-adjust threshold. Monotonic up. Target unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "Stale OPEN BUY order from 7585m ago (5+ days). This is a pending order, cannot MODIFY via this schema. Should be cancelled but cancel-action not represented here; flagging in portfolio_notes for explicit cancel handling."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Thesis intact, SL appropriate"},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL already trailed above entry to 828; no-op on further trail"},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1357.20, "reasoning": "SL locks +7.8% gain; target extended to 1450"},
    {"symbol": "PIDILITIND", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL appears already breached on stored data; respect placement, don't preempt"},
    {"symbol": "WOCKPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1618.00, "reasoning": "SL at breakeven; target raised to 1780 on momentum"},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Marginal gain, SL near entry"},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Flat, allow room to entry thesis"},
    {"symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL appropriate, buyback floor at 12000 supportive"},
    {"symbol": "DABUR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Drawdown within SL absorption"},
    {"symbol": "LAURUSLABS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1240.00, "reasoning": "SL trailed above entry; target raised to 1320"},
    {"symbol": "TATACONSUM", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Intraday fade off high, thesis intact, respect SL"},
    {"symbol": "CGPOWER", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 845.00, "reasoning": "Small tighten of SL from 838 to 845 maintaining 2.3% trail gap"}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Rule 18 walk-through of qualifying BULLISH candidates not held: (1) TATACONSUM mod +0.10 — REJECT: already held, current position -2.3%, no add into drawdown. (2) APOLLOHOSP mod +0.02 — REJECT: NEUTRAL not BULLISH+0.05, +3.3% extended intraday, May 20 binary event in 7 sessions (outside 3-session bar but valuation P/E 62 limits margin). (3) POLYCAB mod +0.10 — already held. (4) NTPC mod +0.08 — REJECT: May 15 Q4 results = binary event within 3 sessions (Rule 11), no new event-trade slot used this session and would exceed 80% deployment. (5) LAURUSLABS, MARICO, COFORGE, WOCKPHARMA, SRF, BAJAJ-AUTO, CGPOWER mods +0.07-+0.10 — all already held. (6) DABUR mod +0.02 — already held, NEUTRAL not BULLISH. (7) NIFTYBEES mod +0.03 — NEUTRAL, broad index in -1% session, no edge. No new BULLISH-rated non-held candidate clears the bar today. Deployment at 50% is below soft target but high VIX (18.37, +9%) + Nifty -1.05% + risk-off tape justifies caution; admit-side appropriately quiet given macro.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Stale HFCL MIS LIMIT order placed 5+ days ago needs explicit CANCEL — flagging for the next cycle if cancel-action becomes available; it's an MIS order that cannot execute now anyway (well past intraday horizon). Book is 12 CNC positions, deployment 50%, well-diversified across FMCG (Marico, Dabur, TataConsum), Pharma/Healthcare (Wockpharma, Lauruslabs), IT (Coforge), Chemicals (Pidilit, SRF), Capital Goods (Polycab, CGPower), Auto (Bajaj-Auto), Energy ETF (GOLDBEES). Net positioned defensive — appropriate for VIX 18+ risk-off session. Trailing SLs on three winners (Coforge target ext, Wockpharma target ext, CGPower SL tightened) locks in gains while letting trends run. Watching for NTPC May 15 + Apollo May 20 binary events on watchlist names — will reassess post-event."
}
